type: 工程感時序圖（UML sequence diagram）
goal: 生成一張微信支付 JSAPI/Native 混合視角的時序點陣圖，突出商戶系統、微信支付平臺與手機微信客戶端三方的同步呼叫與 notify_url 回撥

canvas.background: deep slate #0F172A with subtle 1px grid #1E293B at 32px spacing

title_strip.title: WeChat Pay · unified order to notify
title_strip.subtitle: mchid 1900006XXX · H5/公眾號場景
title_strip.position: top-left, JetBrains Mono / SF Mono, light gray

header_box_style.size: 160px wide × 64px tall, all headers identical size, evenly spaced
header_box_style.label: actor name in mono 11pt + small icon glyph above name

lifelines.rule: 每個 actor header 下方畫垂直虛線 lifeline

items.label: 1. POST /checkout session { sku_id, openid, amount: 19900, currency: CNY }
2. 生成 out_trade_no、attach、notify_url 冪等 key
3. POST /v3/pay/transactions/jsapi Authorization: WECHATPAY2-SHA256... body { mchid, appid, out_trade_no, description, amount{total}, payer{openid} }
5. 200 { timeStamp, nonceStr, package: prepay_id=..., signType, paySign } 給 H5/JS
7. 使用者確認指紋/密碼，扣款
8. POST notify_url? 簽名 X-Wechatpay-Signature, body { out_trade_no, transaction_id, trade_state: SUCCESS }
9. 200 應答 { code: SUCCESS }（必須在 5s 內）
10. 前端輪詢或 WebSocket 收到 order_status=PAID
11. 補償：GET /v3/pay/transactions/out-trade-no/{out_trade_no} 若 notify 未達

message_style.sync: solid line 1.5px slate #94A3B8, filled triangle arrowhead at target
message_style.async: solid line 1.5px slate #94A3B8, hollow triangle arrowhead
message_style.return: dashed line 1.5px slate #64748B, hollow triangle arrowhead

messages.label_format: 編號 + 訊息摘要，含關鍵 HTTP / 欄位名

activation_bars.rule: 商戶後端與 pay API 在請求處理段畫啟用條

notes.rule: 在 M3 側註釋：mTLS/平臺證書 與 APIv3 金鑰用於驗籤與加密敏感欄位

loops_alts.rule: alt 框：notify 重試 與 查詢單補償

legend.content: sync vs return vs notify(callback)；external actor 為 slate

avoid: 聲稱可編輯 PlantUML 源
